prompt: Generate a clear diagram illustrating airport map with runways, terminals and other building facilities. Adopt the simple, top-down information graphic style and terminal structure design from the reference image, depicted on a white background. Label the buildings with text.
prompt_refined: Generate a clear, top-down information graphic of an airport map. The map should prominently feature a main terminal structure whose design and arrangement, including the positioning of airplanes, strictly follow the minimalistic and illustrative styles exemplified in image 1 (e.g., a Standard Linear, Pier, Concourse, Curvilinear, Satellite, or Star Pier type). Additionally, include essential airport elements such as multiple runways, taxiways, and other key facilities like a control tower or hangars, all rendered in the same simplified, top-down graphic style. The entire diagram must be presented on a plain white background. All significant buildings and facilities, including the terminal(s), should be clearly labeled with concise text.
